mapper.select:
SELECT id, cle_cable_code, cle_cable_name, cle_spec_model, cle_insulation_level, cle_cable_length, cle_laying_method, cle_laying_path, cle_install_area, cle_core_number, cle_core_section, cle_manufacturer, cle_production_date, cle_install_date, cle_last_test_date, cle_last_test_data, cle_joint_count, cle_status, cle_factory FROM cable_line_equipment
AND cle_cable_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.cleCableCode}, '%')
AND cle_cable_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.cleCableName}, '%')
AND cle_spec_model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.cleSpecModel}, '%')
AND cle_manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.cleManufacturer}, '%')
AND cle_factory LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.cleFactory}, '%')

SELECT id, cle_cable_code, cle_cable_name, cle_spec_model, cle_insulation_level, cle_cable_length, cle_laying_method, cle_laying_path, cle_install_area, cle_core_number, cle_core_section, cle_manufacturer, cle_production_date, cle_install_date, cle_last_test_date, cle_last_test_data, cle_joint_count, cle_status, cle_factory FROM cable_line_equipment
AND cle_cable_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cleCableCode}, '%')
AND cle_cable_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cleCableName}, '%')
AND cle_spec_model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cleSpecModel}, '%')
AND cle_manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cleManufacturer}, '%')
AND cle_factory LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cleFactory}, '%')
